sentences.arabic: يُحِبُّ طَارِقٌ الْيُوغَا وَيُمَارِسُهَا كُلَّ مَسَاءٍ.
sentences.translation: Tarik voli jogu i vježba je svake večeri.
sentences.translationEn: Tariq loves yoga and practises it every evening.

sentences.arabic: تُسَاعِدُهُ عَلَى الِاسْتِرْخَاءِ بَعْدَ يَوْمٍ مُتْعِبٍ.
sentences.translation: Pomaže mu da se opusti nakon napornog dana.
sentences.translationEn: It helps him relax after a tiring day.

sentences.arabic: تَعَلَّمَ الْيُوغَا مِنْ فِيدِيُوهَاتٍ عَلَى الْإِنْتَرْنِتِ.
sentences.translation: Naučio je jogu gledajući videa na internetu.
sentences.translationEn: He learned yoga from videos on the internet.

sentences.arabic: يَمَارِسُهَا فِي غُرْفَتِهِ عَلَى سَجَّادَةٍ صَغِيرَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Vježba je u svojoj sobi na maloj prostirci.
sentences.translationEn: He practises it in his room on a small mat.
